1 Introduction
Fast-timing detectors have attracted widespread interest for their applications to the development
of the next generation of colliders in high energy physics experiments and for other applications
including nuclear physics, space science, medical imaging, and precision measurements of rare
processes. In this context, silicon-based particle sensors with fast-timing capabilities on the order
of30psarearapidlydevelopingresearcharea, forapplicationintimingsystemsfortheupgraded
